# NyumbaniKisii Student Hostel Portal
# llms.txt — seo-aeo-geo skill applied
# AI-readable site description for large language model crawlers

## What this site is

NyumbaniKisii is a student accommodation search and booking portal for Kisii University students in Kisii, Kenya. It helps students find, compare, and book verified hostel rooms near the Kisii University main campus.

## Primary audience

- Kisii University undergraduate and postgraduate students seeking affordable accommodation
- Property owners listing student hostels near Kisii University
- Guests and visitors needing short-term student accommodation near the campus

## Core features

- Browse and search hostels across 8 estate zones: On-Campus, Mwembe, Nyanchwa, Milimani, Jogoo, Safariland, Nyaura, and Canaan
- Filter by budget, distance to campus, Wi-Fi, borehole water, hot shower, and room type
- View room availability grids with bed-level occupancy tracking
- Book rooms with M-PESA payment simulation and invoice generation
- Schedule virtual video tours with property caretakers via Google Meet, WhatsApp, or Zoom
- Submit maintenance requests for repairs and facility issues
- AI assistant (Sophia) for hostel guidance and accommodation questions
- Compare up to 3 hostels side by side
- Student account management with Firebase authentication

## Hostel estate zones and distances from campus

- On-Campus: 0–50m, strictest security, warden patrol
- Mwembe (Main Gate Area): 150–300m, highly active, caretaker armed
- Nyanchwa Hills: 350–650m, secure highlands, panoramic views
- Milimani Executive: 400–800m, upscale, premium security guarded
- Jogoo Estate: 500–900m, economical, high student population
- Safariland Plaza: 300–550m, near shops and commercial centers
- Nyaura Outpost: 650–950m, tranquil, nature-rich
- Canaan Estate: 450–755m, modern, high water consistency

## Rental pricing range

Monthly: KES 3,500 – KES 12,000 per person
Semester: KES 14,000 – KES 48,000 per person

## Technical stack

React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Firebase (Auth + Firestore)

## Contact and institution
